start_command.description: /start command - Initialize bot and welcome user

help_command.description: /help command - Display available commands and usage

message_handler.description: message_handler() - Main entry point for all text messages, routes to ai_logic

process_user_input.description: process_user_input() - Core bot intelligence, parses user intent and returns responses

get_bitcoin_price.description: get_bitcoin_price() - Fetches current BTC price from CoinGecko API

get_or_create_user.description: get_or_create_user() - Fetches existing user from DB or creates new one

User_model.description: User class - SQLAlchemy model for users table (telegram + email users)

init_db.description: init_db() - Creates all database tables on startup

get_session.description: get_session() - Returns SQLAlchemy session for database operations

create_app.description: create_app() - Creates Telegram bot application and configures handlers

health_check.description: GET /health - Returns bot health status for monitoring

webhook_endpoint.description: POST /webhook - Receives updates from Telegram and forwards to bot app
